arts.ttl: Four players could miss Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham after huge Son Heung-Min update
arts.sum: Tottenham have been dealt a major blow ahead of their Europa League quarter-final second leg against Eintracht Frankfurt, with Son Heung-Min still unavailable. Despite the significant blow, Kevin Danso is set to return to squad, after missing the last four Premier League games with a thigh issue.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham predicted as Europa League semi-final fate decided
arts.sum: Tottenham will be looking to secure their place in the Europa League semi-finals later today, with Spurs travelling to Germany to take on Eintracht Frankfurt in the quarter-finals second leg. Despite the second-half onslaught, Postecoglou's side defended well to hold out for the win and confirm their place in the Europa League semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Tottenham keen to re-sign former player, but face Chelsea competition
arts.sum: Tottenham are keen on a potential move to re-sign Kyle Walker-Peters this summer, but a number of other Premier League clubs are also considering him. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Spurs are showing the strongest interest in Walker-Peters for the moment. The 28-year-old will be out of contract […] The post Revealed: Tottenham keen to re-sign former player, but face Chelsea competition appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt, buoyed by a strong home record, prepares to host Tottenham in the second leg of their Europa League clash at Deutsche Bank Park. The game kicks off at 20:00 on Thursday, April 17t...

arts.ttl: Now or never for Postecoglou to save Spurs' season - and his job?
arts.sum: Tottenham face Eintracht Frankfurt in Europa League quarter-final second leg with questions growing around Ange Postecoglou's future. Is this a match he has to win to safeguard his future?

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou says Tottenham have two 'strong leaders' in their ranks who he expects to step up v Frankfurt tonight
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are set for the biggest game of their season so far when they take on Eintracht Frankfurt in their Europa League last-16 second...

arts.ttl: Tottenham have triple suspension risk for Europa League semi-final as yellow card rule explained
arts.sum: As yellow cards expire on completion of the quarter-finals, a player cannot be suspended for the final even if they are cautioned in both legs of a victorious semi-final tie. Ange Postecoglou's side play Eintracht Frankfurt in the second leg of their quarter-final tie on Thursday evening with the score locked at 1-1.

arts.ttl: How flamboyant Eintracht Frankfurt star Hugo Ekitike recovered from 'mental weakness' to become one of Europe's hottest young strikers - and how much he could really cost Arsenal and Liverpool this summer, writes JAMES SHARPE
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: It took Hugo Ekitike just six minutes to show the rest of Europe why he's one of the most wanted young strikers on the continent.

arts.ttl: It's do-or-die for under-fire Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham as Frankfurt's forest of fury awaits, writes MATT BARLOW
arts.sum: Back in the days before naming rights tore into German football, they called Eintracht Frankfurt's home the Waldstadion, literally forest stadium, due to its setting in an area of woodland outside the city.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham visit Eintracht Frankfurt in the Europa League on Thursday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.
